title: BEM-899 autonomous ready
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/autonomy').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

required = [
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_READY.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM895_AUTONOMOUS_LOOP_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM897_REPORT_PACKAGING_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM898_REPOSITORY_HEALTH_HEALTHY.md',
 'governance/state/autonomous_execution_loop.json',
 'governance/state/policy_gate.json',
 'governance/dashboard/repository_health.json',
 'governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
backlog_pending = []
backlog = Path('governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    backlog_pending = [i.get('id') for i in b.get('items', []) if i.get('status') != 'completed']
health = 'UNKNOWN'
health_path = Path('governance/dashboard/repository_health.json')
if health_path.exists():
    health = json.loads(health_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')).get('status','UNKNOWN')
status = 'AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY' if not missing and not backlog_pending and health == 'HEALTHY' else 'AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_NOT_READY'
state = {
  'bem':'BEM-899',
  'status':status,
  'baseline':'READY',
  'sending_contour':'SENDING_CONTOUR_READY',
  'autonomous_loop':'active',
  'policy_gate':'active',
  'health':health,
  'missing':missing,
  'backlog_pending':backlog_pending,
  'result':'repository has operational autonomous sending contour baseline' if status == 'AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY' else 'repository autonomous sending contour has blockers'
}
Path('governance/state/autonomous_sending_contour_readiness.json').write_text(json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
manifest = '# BEM-899 Autonomous sending contour manifest\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nRequired artifacts:\n'
for p in required:
    manifest += '- ' + p + '\n'
manifest += '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\nPending backlog: ' + (', '.join(backlog_pending) if backlog_pending else 'none') + '\n\nHealth: ' + health + '\n'
Path('governance/autonomy/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_MANIFEST.md').write_text(manifest, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_READY.md').write_text('# BEM-899 Autonomous sending contour final readiness\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\nPending backlog: ' + (', '.join(backlog_pending) if backlog_pending else 'none') + '\n\nHealth: ' + health + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM899_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-899 autonomous sending contour proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\nPending backlog: ' + (', '.join(backlog_pending) if backlog_pending else 'none') + '\nHealth: ' + health + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
curator = '# BEM-899 FINAL AUTONOMOUS SENDING CONTOUR RESPONSE\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nFindings:\n- Repository baseline is READY.\n- Sending contour is READY.\n- Autonomous loop is active.\n- Policy gate is active.\n- Cycle report packaging is active.\n- Repository health dashboard is HEALTHY.\n\nEvidence:\n- governance/autonomy/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_MANIFEST.md\n- governance/state/autonomous_sending_contour_readiness.json\n- ' + str(marker) + '\n\nRecommendation:\n- Continue development from AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY baseline.\n'
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM899_FINAL_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_RESPONSE.md').write_text(curator, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/autonomous_sending_contour_readiness.json','governance/autonomy/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_MANIFEST.md','governance/reports/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_READY.md',str(marker),'governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM899_FINAL_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_RESPONSE.md'])
ops_applied.append('BEM899 autonomous sending contour ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
